{{CargoRelic
|name=Rigoletto
|class_id=21274
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This is an opera composed by Italian composer Verdi, adapted from Hugo's play The King Amuses Himself, telling the tragic story of the court jester Rigoletto and his daughter Gilda. The composer vividly portrays the characters' emotions through rich musical language. Especially the arias and duets in the opera, such as the famous aria "La donna è mobile," not only showcase the characters' inner worlds but also become classic melodies in opera history.
|fame=35
|art=75
|fth=42
|civ=49
|tech=42
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
